scenario: Performance baseline: capture P50/P95/P99 latency under load
expected_behavior: Skill captures machine-generated baseline: latency_p50_ms, latency_p95_ms, latency_p99_ms, throughput_rps, error_rate_pct. Writes perf-baseline.json with all fields from load test output. Manual estimates are NOT accepted.
notes: Warmup iterations (≥10) discarded before measurement to ensure steady-state (JIT warm, cache warm). Baseline used by /s7-telemetry for post-deploy comparison.

scenario: SLO gate FAIL: P99 latency exceeds requirement

input.performance_ac: API must respond < 200ms at P99 under 100 concurrent users

expected_behavior: Skill should BLOCK progression to /s6-verify-release. Status: BLOCKED with exact values: 'P99 = 450ms, target = 200ms.' Performance regressions are BLOCKING.
notes: No 'close enough' exceptions. If metric > threshold, it FAILS, period. Gate existence = enforcement, not suggestion.

scenario: Memory leak detection: sustained load over 10 minutes
expected_behavior: Skill detects monotonic RSS growth via tracemalloc (Python) or heap snapshot (Node.js). Sets memory_leak_detected: true. Flags as slo_gate: FAIL if leak confirmed.
notes: Optional but recommended: compare before/after snapshots. PostgreSQL: log_lock_waits = on. MySQL: innodb_print_all_deadlocks = ON.

scenario: Regression check: 20%+ worse metric vs previous baseline
expected_behavior: Skill compares against previous baseline. Detects (185-150)/150 = 23.3% regression. Status: DONE_WITH_CONCERNS, listing metrics close to threshold.
notes: Regression = metric 20%+ worse. Report numeric values for every metric, not vague descriptions.

scenario: First iteration: no baseline exists yet
expected_behavior: Skill still validates against Stage 2 performance AC. Even without prior baseline, must verify AC-N.M is met. Writes perf-baseline.json for future comparison. Status: DONE if SLO targets met.
notes: First baseline has no comparison pair, but must still pass acceptance criteria defined in requirements.
